tasks.title: Create Webhook database schema and migration
tasks.description: Create the Webhook table with all fields from the data model. Add Prisma schema definition and generate migration.
tasks.validation: Migration runs successfully and Webhook table exists with all 7 fields

tasks.title: Implement webhook registration endpoint
tasks.description: Create POST /webhooks endpoint. Validate HTTPS URL, generate HMAC secret, store webhook, return response with secret displayed only on creation.
tasks.validation: POST /webhooks returns 201 with valid payload, 400 with invalid URL, 409 with duplicate URL

tasks.title: Implement webhook CRUD endpoints
tasks.description: Add GET /webhooks (list), PUT /webhooks/:id (update), DELETE /webhooks/:id to the webhooks router. DELETE must cancel pending deliveries (EC-003).
tasks.validation: GET returns user's webhooks, PUT updates URL/events, DELETE removes and cancels pending jobs

tasks.title: Create webhook delivery queue with retry logic
tasks.description: Create BullMQ job queue for webhook delivery. Implement retry with exponential backoff (10s, 60s, 300s). Set 30s timeout per request. On exhaustion, mark webhook as failing and notify user.
tasks.validation: Delivery job retries 3 times on failure, respects backoff schedule, marks webhook as failing after exhaustion

tasks.title: Add HMAC-SHA256 payload signing
tasks.description: Create signing utility that generates HMAC-SHA256 signature using the webhook's secret. Use constant-time comparison for verification. Attach signature as X-Signature-256 header.
tasks.validation: Signature matches expected HMAC-SHA256 output, constant-time comparison confirmed in test

tasks.title: Wire event handler to delivery queue
tasks.description: Create event listener that looks up active webhooks for an event type and enqueues delivery jobs. Skip webhooks marked as failing. Check for deleted webhooks before enqueuing.
tasks.validation: Event fires, matching webhooks receive delivery jobs, deleted webhooks are skipped
